gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the Cachet branding and source-layout documentation slice, including the separation between product brand, distribution name, and import namespace; no merge-blocking findings were reported.
verification: repository secret scan over README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, pyproject.toml, src, tests, databricks, pr-evidence, and .github
what_changed: Introduced Cachet as the top-level product brand while keeping document-kv-cache as the Python distribution and document_kv_cache as the import namespace.
Added a Purpose And Scope README section covering target use cases, V1 benchmark/model/hardware scope, the no-cache baseline, and the vLLM/SGLang serving-engine boundary.
Updated src/README.md to describe document_kv_cache as the canonical implementation package and restaurant_kv_serving as migration-only compatibility.
Added governance tests that pin the Cachet brand, purpose/scope language, and source-layout ownership wording.
why: The project goal requires a distinct premium package brand plus clear purpose, goals, target use cases, and directory documentation while preserving the already-published package and import names during migration.
